---
name: appwrite-schema
description: "Manage Appwrite database collections, attributes, indexes, buckets, and CLI sync. USE FOR: adding new collections or attributes, modifying indexes, pushing schema changes via Appwrite CLI 5.x, reviewing schema against docs/core/03_appwrite_db_schema.md, validating naming against platform limits. DO NOT USE FOR: writing Functions (use appwrite-function), frontend code."
argument-hint: "Describe the schema change: new collection, add attribute, modify index"
---

# Appwrite Schema — OMZONE

## When to Use

- Add a new collection or modify an existing one
- Add/remove attributes or indexes
- Push schema changes to Appwrite via CLI
- Validate naming against platform limits
- Review schema alignment with canonical docs

## Source of Truth

The canonical schema lives in `docs/core/03_appwrite_db_schema.md`. Any change must be reflected there AND in `appwrite.config.json`.

## Naming Conventions

| Element        | Convention   | Max length |
| -------------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| `databaseId`   | `main`       | 36 chars   |
| `collectionId` | `snake_case` | 36 chars   |
| `bucketId`     | `kebab-case` | 36 chars   |
| `indexName`    | `snake_case` | 36 chars   |
| Attribute key  | `camelCase`  | 32 chars   |
| `functionId`   | `kebab-case` | 36 chars   |

## Active Collections

| Collection          | Purpose                            |
| ------------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `users_profile`     | Extended user profile              |
| `contact_leads`     | CRM prospects                      |
| `instructors`       | Instructor content entities        |
| `class_types`       | Class taxonomy                     |
| `classes`           | Main class catalog                 |
| `class_sessions`    | Bookable sessions                  |
| `wellness_products` | Wellness kitchen products          |
| `wellness_packages` | Prepaid packages (yoga + wellness) |
| `orders`            | Purchase documents                 |
| `order_items`       | Order line items                   |
| `payments`          | Payment records                    |
| `bookings`          | Class reservations                 |
| `client_packages`   | Client purchased packages          |
| `package_usages`    | Package credit consumptions        |
| `access_passes`     | QR access passes                   |
| `promo_codes`       | Promotional discounts              |
| `site_content`      | Editable CMS content               |
| `audit_logs`        | Internal audit trail               |
| `app_settings`      | Global config                      |

> `membership_plans` and `memberships` do **NOT** exist in this MVP.

## Storage Buckets

| Bucket          | Access      | Max size |
| --------------- | ----------- | -------- |
| `public-media`  | Public read | 10 MB    |
| `private-media` | Restricted  | 15 MB    |

## Attribute Type Reference

| Appwrite type | Schema notation  | Notes                          |
| ------------- | ---------------- | ------------------------------ |
| `string`      | `string` + `max` | Always specify max             |
| `email`       | `email`          | Built-in validation            |
| `enum`        | `enum`           | Comma-separated allowed values |
| `integer`     | `integer`        | Optional min/max range         |
| `float`       | `float`          | For prices                     |
| `boolean`     | `boolean`        | Optional default               |
| `datetime`    | `datetime`       | ISO 8601                       |
| `string[]`    | `string[]`       | Array; document max items      |

## Index Types

| Type       | Use case                                  |
| ---------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `key`      | Standard lookup index                     |
| `unique`   | Enforce uniqueness (e.g., slugs, orderNo) |
| `fulltext` | Text search (use sparingly)               |

## CLI Workflow

```bash
# Login (once)
appwrite login

# Pull current schema from remote
appwrite pull databases

# Push local schema to remote
appwrite push databases

# Push specific resources
appwrite push collections
appwrite push buckets
```

Config file: `appwrite.config.json` at repo root (generated by CLI 5.x).

## Adding a New Collection — Procedure

1. **Document in schema doc**: Add to `docs/core/03_appwrite_db_schema.md` with full attribute table.
2. **Validate naming**: Ensure all IDs and attribute keys respect `09_appwrite_platform_limits.md`.
3. **Update appwrite.config.json**: Add the collection definition (or use CLI `appwrite init collection`).
4. **Push to Appwrite**: `appwrite push databases`.
5. **Update permissions doc**: Add row to `docs/core/05_permissions_and_roles.md`.
6. **Create mock data**: Add JSON file to `docs/mock-data/<category>/`.
7. **Create mock service**: Add functions to appropriate mock service in `src/services/mocks/`.

## Adding an Attribute — Procedure

1. Update the collection spec in `03_appwrite_db_schema.md`.
2. Add the attribute in `appwrite.config.json`.
3. `appwrite push databases`.
4. Update mock data JSON if needed.
5. Update mock service and hooks.

## Permission Patterns

| Pattern           | Appwrite permission     | When                                |
| ----------------- | ----------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| Public read       | `read("any")`           | Catalog collections                 |
| User own          | `read("user:{userId}")` | With document security ON           |
| Label-based       | `read("label:admin")`   | Admin-only collections              |
| No frontend write | (no write perms)        | Protected collections via Functions |

## Checklist

1. Collection ID ≤ 36 chars, `snake_case`
2. Attribute keys ≤ 32 chars, `camelCase`
3. Index names ≤ 36 chars, `snake_case`
4. String attributes always have `max` specified
5. Document security OFF for all MVP collections
6. Schema doc updated before push
7. `appwrite.config.json` committed after push
8. Avoid over-indexing (only index what's actually queried)
